prompt: Which restaurants have confirmed prep today?

assertions.name: outputs_numbered_list
assertions.description: Output contains a numbered list of restaurant names

assertions.name: includes_total_count
assertions.description: Output includes the total number of confirmed restaurants

assertions.name: deduplicates_restaurants
assertions.description: Each restaurant appears only once even if it sent multiple emails

assertions.name: uses_correct_format
assertions.description: Output follows the format specified in the skill (header with date, count, numbered list)
